economic_notes: Nation receives 68% of revenue from ISC and FNIH (down from 73% prior year). Holds unit in Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (OFNLP) receiving share of 1.7% of provincial gross gaming revenues. Community centre and water treatment plant under construction with carrying value of $5,855,738. COVID-19 noted as having significant impact on operations.
notes: Fiscal year is March 31, 2021 (not 2024). Audit report dated July 27, 2022 - over a year late; Nation notes non-compliance with First Nations Financial Transparency Act due to late audit. No long-term debt as of March 31, 2021 (prior year had $1,809,865 repaid). Large asset under construction (community centre and water treatment plant) at $5,855,738 not yet amortized. Expenses_salaries_total summed from segment schedules: Admin $241,492 + Education $166,448 + Health $233,185 + Comm&Econ $43,538 + O&M $161,182 = $845,845 (Capital Funds and OFNLP segments had no salary line). No schedule of remuneration provided. Community and Economic Development segment includes capital funds transfers. OFNLP revenue partially deferred. Accounts receivable includes both due from governments ($308,639) and trade receivables ($75,000). Current liabilities includes accounts payable ($247,190) and funding repayable ($365,035).
